description_long: This is a brass trumpet with a classic, elongated cylindrical body and a flared bell at one end. The instrument features three piston valves arranged in a row, each topped with a round button for finger actuation. The bell is wide and gradually flares outward, providing a resonant opening for sound projection. The mouthpiece is silver-colored and attached at the opposite end of the bell, connected to a gently curved leadpipe. The main tuning slide is U-shaped and positioned just before the valve section, allowing for pitch adjustment. The trumpet's surface is smooth and metallic, with a golden brass finish and silver accents on the mouthpiece and valve caps.
description: A golden brass trumpet with a wide flared bell, three piston valves, and a silver mouthpiece. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a classic, gently curved design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the trumpet, the three piston valves, and the wide flared bell.
description_view_1: Front view looking directly into the bell, highlighting the circular opening and the alignment of the valves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the trumpet's profile, valves, and the mouthpiece end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the mouthpiece and the curvature of the leadpipe, with the bell receding into the background.
attribute_bell_flare: The bell is wide and gradually flares outward, creating a smooth, open shape.
attribute_valve_configuration: Three piston valves are arranged in a straight line along the top of the trumpet, evenly spaced.
attribute_leadpipe_curvature: The leadpipe is gently curved, connecting the mouthpiece to the main tuning slide in a smooth arc.
attribute_tuning_slide_location: The main tuning slide is U-shaped and located just before the valve section, oriented horizontally.
